title: pteris dichotoma var. elongata
intro: Pteris dichotoma var. elongata, commonly known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Pteris dichotoma var. elongata include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of capsules or tinctures.
